require 'json'
require 'date'

raw_string = input['raw_payload'] || "[]"
value_ranges = JSON.parse(raw_string)

clean_header = ->(h) { h.to_s.gsub(/\s+/, ' ').strip.downcase }

# HELPER: Convert Google Sheets serial dates (e.g. 45992 -> 2025-12-01)
convert_date = ->(val) do
  return nil if val.nil? || val.to_s.strip.empty?
  str_val = val.to_s.strip
  
  if str_val.match?(/^\d+$/)
    (Date.new(1899, 12, 30) + str_val.to_i).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
  else
    str_val
  end
end

# HELPER: Dynamic Range Finder (Header Sniffing)
find_parent_range_by_header = ->(identifying_header) do
  target_header = clean_header.call(identifying_header)
  
  value_ranges.find do |range_data|
    next false if range_data.nil? || range_data['values'].nil?
    
    unwrapped = range_data['values'].map do |row|
      if row.is_a?(Hash) && row.key?('array')
        row['array'] || []
      elsif row.is_a?(Array)
        row
      else
        []
      end
    end
    
    header_row = unwrapped.find do |row|
      !(row.nil? || row.empty? || row.all? { |c| c.to_s.strip.empty? })
    end
    
    if header_row
      header_row.any? { |cell| clean_header.call(cell) == target_header }
    else
      false
    end
  end
end

# CORE ENGINE: Parses the isolated table dataset
parse_dataset = ->(range_data, header_mapping, range_start_row) do
  return [] if range_data.nil? || range_data['values'].nil? || range_data['values'].empty?

  unwrapped_values = range_data['values']
  raw_headers = unwrapped_values[0] || []
  data_rows_raw = unwrapped_values[1..-1] || []

  found_data = false
  filtered_data_rows = []

  # Filter empty rows
  data_rows_raw.each_with_index do |row, original_idx|
    is_empty = row.nil? || row.empty? || row.all? { |cell| cell.to_s.strip.empty? }

    if is_empty
      break if found_data
      next
    else
      found_data = true
      filtered_data_rows << {
        row_data: row,
        physical_row: range_start_row + 1 + original_idx 
      }
    end
  end

  return [] if filtered_data_rows.empty?

  header_map = {}

  # Build the Header Map
  raw_headers.each_with_index do |h, idx|
    clean_h = clean_header.call(h)
    
    header_mapping.keys.each do |sheet_header|
      if clean_h == clean_header.call(sheet_header)
        header_map[sheet_header] = idx
        break
      end
    end
  end

  normalized_data = []
  
  filtered_data_rows.each do |meta|
    row = meta[:row_data]
    physical_row = meta[:physical_row]
    row_obj = {}

    header_mapping.each do |sheet_header, output_key|
      col_idx = header_map[sheet_header]
      val = col_idx ? row[col_idx] : nil
      
      if output_key == "start_date" || output_key == "end_date"
        row_obj[output_key] = convert_date.call(val)
      else
        row_obj[output_key] = val.nil? ? nil : val.to_s
      end
    end
    
    row_obj["sheet_row_number"] = physical_row.to_s
    normalized_data << row_obj
  end

  normalized_data
end

# HELPER: Vertical Slicing using Empty Column Boundaries (Order-Agnostic)
extract_and_parse_table = ->(parent_range, expected_mapping, range_start_row) do
  return [] if parent_range.nil? || parent_range['values'].nil?

  unwrapped_parent = parent_range['values'].map do |row|
    if row.is_a?(Hash) && row.key?('array')
      row['array'] || []
    elsif row.is_a?(Array)
      row
    else
      []
    end
  end

  header_row_idx = unwrapped_parent.index { |row| !(row.nil? || row.empty? || row.all? { |c| c.to_s.strip.empty? }) }
  return [] unless header_row_idx

  raw_parent_headers = unwrapped_parent[header_row_idx]
  target_headers = expected_mapping.keys
  
  # Group the headers into contiguous blocks
  current_block_start = nil
  blocks = []
  
  raw_parent_headers.each_with_index do |h, idx|
    if h.to_s.strip.empty?
      if current_block_start
        blocks << { start: current_block_start, end_col: idx - 1 }
        current_block_start = nil
      end
    else
      current_block_start = idx if current_block_start.nil?
    end
  end
  blocks << { start: current_block_start, end_col: raw_parent_headers.length - 1 } if current_block_start

  # Find the block containing our target headers
  target_block = blocks.find do |block|
    block_headers = raw_parent_headers[block[:start]..block[:end_col]].map { |h| clean_header.call(h) }
    
    target_headers.all? do |exp_h|
      block_headers.include?(clean_header.call(exp_h))
    end
  end

  return [] unless target_block

  start_col = target_block[:start]
  end_col = target_block[:end_col]

  # Slice the 2D array vertically to isolate just this block's columns
  sliced_values = unwrapped_parent[header_row_idx..-1].map do |row|
    sliced = row[start_col..end_col]
    sliced.nil? ? [] : sliced
  end

  sliced_range_data = { 'values' => sliced_values }
  
  # Pass isolated block into core parser
  parse_dataset.call(sliced_range_data, expected_mapping, range_start_row + header_row_idx)
end

# DEFINE MAPPING
headers_opp = { 
  "Product Code" => "product_code", 
  "Quantity" => "quantity", 
  "Start Date" => "start_date", 
  "End Date" => "end_date", 
  "List Price" => "list_price", 
  "Commitment Type" => "commitment_type", 
  "Sales Comments" => "sales_comments", 
  "Per Unit Fee Override" => "per_unit_fee_override", 
  "List Price Discount" => "list_price_discount", 
  "Unit Override" => "unit_override", 
  "Total Override" => "total_override", 
  "Additional Discount" => "additional_discount", 
  "Web Login" => "web_login", 
  "On-Demand Table" => "on_demand_table" 
}

# EXECUTE 
{
  "csv_oppstep1" => extract_and_parse_table.call(find_parent_range_by_header.call("Product Code"), headers_opp, 1)
}
